task_completion.description: Create the left pulley with a 50mm radius centered at the origin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A circle centered at the origin (0,0) with a visible radial or diameter constraint indicating 50mm (e.g., 'r50.00' or 'd100.00').

task_completion.description: Create the right pulley with a 25mm radius located 250mm from the origin on the X-axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second circle with a radial constraint of 25mm (e.g., 'r25.00' or 'd50.00'), and a horizontal distance constraint of 250mm between the centers of the two circles.

task_completion.description: Connect the pulleys with tangent lines.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two straight lines connecting the top and bottom of the two circles, with 4 tangent constraint icons (small line-and-circle symbols) visible at the intersection points.

task_completion.description: Form a single closed loop representing the belt path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The inner arcs of the circles between the tangent points are trimmed or constructed as construction lines, leaving only a single continuous outer boundary (the belt envelope).

task_completion.description: Extrude the 2D profile to a 15mm depth.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport shows the belt profile extruded into a solid 3D object. The property browser/text window on the left should display an extrusion depth parameter of 15mm.

task_completion.description: Save the resulting model to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace window title bar displays 'belt_envelope.slvs' or a save dialog shows the file being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace application interface with active toolbars, property browser, and 3D viewport, rather than just a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The constraints are genuine SolveSpace entities.
integrity.visual_evidence: Constraints (dimensions, tangents) appear in the standard SolveSpace magenta/green colors and formatting within the 3D viewport, not as overlaid text from an image editor.

integrity.description: The result is a genuine 3D model.
integrity.visual_evidence: The viewport shows a shaded or wireframe 3D object that responds to the extrusion tool, rather than a 2D drawing or imported image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/belt_envelope.slvs. Left pulley radius: 50mm. Right pulley radius: 25mm. Distance between centers: 250mm. Required tangent constraints: exactly 4. Extrusion depth: 15mm.
